attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 NSNT.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY, 
 NSNT.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
 NSNT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
 NSNT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT, 
 NSNT.PROCESS_DT, 
 NSNT.PRODUCT_KEY, 
 NSNT.SALESREP_NUMBER, 
 NSNT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 NSNT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 NSNT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 NSNT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 NSNT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
 NSNT.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT, 
 NSNT.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_USD_AMT, 
 NSNT.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT, 
 NSNT.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY, 
 NSNT.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 NSNT.DD_NCB_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD, 
 NSNT.DD_NCB_SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_LINT, 
 NSNT.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG, 
 NSNT.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG, 
 NSNT.REVENUE_FLAG, 
 NSNT.RMA_FLAG, 
 NSNT.DD_NCB_SS_CD, 
 NSNT.CANCELLED_FLAG, 
 NSNT.ACQUISITION_FLAG, 
 NSNT.DD_NC_DRVD_OVERLAY_FLG, 
 NSNT.IC_REVENUE_FLAG, 
 NSNT.CHARGES_FLAG, 
 NSNT.MISC_FLAG, 
 NSNT.SERVICE_FLAG, 
 NSNT.DV_NCB_CORPORATE_NCB_FLG, 
 NSNT.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG, 
 NSNT.DD_NCB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT, 
 NSNT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
 NSNT.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG, 
 NSNT.DV_CHANNEL_NCB_FLG, 
 NSNT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 NSNT.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
 NSNT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 NSNT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 NSNT.CONVERSION_RT, 
 NSNT.CONVERSION_DT,
 NSNT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,            
 NSNT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,  
 NSNT.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,      
 NSNT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
 NSNT.POB_TYPE_CD,
 NSNT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG         
 /* Added as part of XAAS Q2FY18 */
 ,NSNT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
 ,NSNT.TRX_TYPE_CD
 ,NSNT.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY    
 /* END OF XAAS Q2FY18 */ 
 /*ACV*/
 ,-999 AS ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY
 ,-999 AS XAAS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY
 ,'N' AS TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG
 ,'N' AS HISTORY_FLG
 ,CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_ORIG_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT
 				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NSNT.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NSNT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NSNT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCAA_NCB_TV NSNT 
 WHERE NSNT.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01'
 AND  NSNT.TRX_TYPE_CD IN ('ERP') /*ACV*/
 AND NSNT.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY < 0
 AND NOT EXISTS
 (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCAA_NCB  NSN
 WHERE NSN.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY=NSNT.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY
 AND  NSN.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NSNT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 /*ACV*/
 AND  NSN.TRX_TYPE_CD IN ('ERP')
 AND  NSNT.TRX_TYPE_CD IN ('ERP')
 AND NSN.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY < 0
 )
